channel.title: TurnkeyAI Services Blog
channel.description: Gulf Coast small business websites, local SEO, and family sites — built in 24 hours.

item.title: What Makes TurnkeyAI Different From Every Other Website Builder
item.description: Wix, Squarespace, and GoDaddy put the work on you. TurnkeyAI does it all — in 24 hours, from a simple 10-minute form. We're based in Bay St. Louis, Mississippi, and we build for Gulf Coast businesses and families. Website Only at $99/month. Add a Blog for $129/month. Full package with social posting for $159/month. No surprises.

item.title: Restaurants and Food Businesses on the Gulf Coast: Your Menu Belongs Online
item.description: Gulf Coast restaurants and food businesses without a website are losing customers every day to competitors who are easier to find online. If you're not showing up in Google search, you don't exist to visiting tourists or new residents. Get your menu, hours, and location online — built in 24 hours.

item.title: Preserving Family History on the Gulf Coast: The Digital Archive Every Family Should Build
item.description: Gulf Coast families with deep roots in Mississippi, Louisiana, and Alabama are using family websites to preserve stories, photos, and recipes for future generations. Private, secure, and permanent — unlike Facebook. $29/month, live in 24 hours.

item.title: How a $99/Month Website Pays for Itself With One New Customer
item.description: Skeptical about the cost of a website for your Gulf Coast business? The math is simple: one new recurring client covers your entire monthly website cost. A TurnkeyAI website costs $99/month. For a cleaning company, one new recurring client is worth $150-300/month. Your website works 24/7 — it doesn't take days off or miss calls.

item.title: Why Gulf Coast Salons and Spas Are Losing Appointments to Competitors With Better Websites
item.description: Salons and spas in Biloxi, Gulfport, and Pass Christian are watching customers book with competitors online while they rely on phone calls alone. Online booking is no longer optional. A growing percentage of customers — especially anyone under 40 — prefer to book appointments online. Get your salon website live tomorrow.

item.title: Mississippi Recipe Creators: Turn Your Family Recipes Into Income
item.description: Mississippi home cooks and recipe creators are building audiences and earning real income from their recipes online. Mississippi has some of the richest food culture in America — gumbo, crawfish étouffée, smoked catfish, fig preserves, sweet potato pie. TurnkeyAI builds recipe sites with free and premium tiers, paid download capability, and beautiful recipe card formatting.

item.title: What Is Local SEO and Why Does Every Bay St. Louis Business Need It?
item.description: Local SEO is the process of getting your Bay St. Louis business to show up when nearby customers search Google. Every TurnkeyAI site includes proper title tags, meta descriptions, local schema markup, and NAP consistency — the technical foundation that gets Gulf Coast businesses found.

item.title: Selling Handmade Goods on the Gulf Coast? Stop Paying Etsy's Fees
item.description: Gulf Coast crafters and artisans are leaving Etsy and opening their own online stores — keeping 90% of every sale instead of splitting it with a platform. TurnkeyAI builds crafter stores with product listings, Stripe checkout, order notifications, and your own domain — ready to open in 24 hours.

item.title: Contractors on the Gulf Coast: Why Your Truck Wrap Isn't Enough Anymore
item.description: Contractors in Biloxi, Gulfport, and Bay St. Louis are losing jobs to competitors with better websites. Homeowners research before they call — they're Googling, looking at photos, reading reviews. After every hurricane season, out-of-state contractors flood the Gulf Coast. The locals who survive are the ones customers can find online.

item.title: Family Reunion Coming Up? Why Your Family Needs Its Own Website
item.description: Planning a family reunion on the Gulf Coast? A dedicated family website makes RSVPs, photos, and coordination simple for everyone. One link the whole family bookmarks — with the reunion date, location, schedule, directions, RSVP form, and photo gallery. Password-protected. $29/month and live in 24 hours.

item.title: House Cleaners in Biloxi and Gulfport: How to Get More Customers Without Paying for Ads
item.description: House cleaning companies in Biloxi and Gulfport are winning new customers with professional websites and local SEO — no ad budget required. When someone types "house cleaner near me" into Google, the businesses that show up are the ones with a real website, consistent NAP information, and Google reviews.

item.title: Why Every Gulf Coast Small Business Needs a Website in 2026
item.description: If your Bay St. Louis, Biloxi, or Gulfport business doesn't have a website, you're invisible to customers searching online. Over 80% of consumers research a business online before contacting them. TurnkeyAI builds your site in 24 hours from a simple form you fill out on your phone. No developers. No tech skills needed.
